name: Weisenheimer
description: Like other Hyperion SMGs, the Weisenheimer starts with noticeable sway and tightens up the longer you keep firing. The accuracy shown reflects its fully stabilised state. It belongs to a set of Hyperion SMGs that always roll with a fixed element via a Maliwan barrel, giving higher elemental chance and damage-over-time than usual. These bonuses can be pushed further with a Maliwan grip. Although not a top-tier rarity, its strong status effects can carry you well until you find a rarer upgrade.
notes: Related fixed-element Hyperion SMGs include Backburner (incendiary), Storm (shock), Wellness (slag), and Cooler (cryo). The Weisenheimer only appears at green rarity or above. In Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel it commonly uses the newer Hyperion materials and prefixes seen in Borderlands 2. An old-Hyperion variant also exists there, named the Ascerbic. It is a world drop from any appropriate loot source.
